examples: Objective Study on superantigen Pseudomonas aeruginosa exotoxin A (PE) and its relationship with accessory cell (AC).
The toxin may be formed within the pathogen and released when it dies (endotoxin), or secreted through its cell wall (exotoxin).
Objective in order to isolate and purify an exotoxin of Streptococcus mitis which can cause toxic shock syndrome and investigate its pathogenicity.
